scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/ruby@3.3/bin:$PATH" bundle exec rails server
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d db && cd apps/api && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/ruby@3.3/bin:$PATH" bundle exec rails db:create db:schema:load db:seed
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/ruby@3.3/bin:$PATH" bundle exec rails test
scripts.test:api:prepare: cd apps/api && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/ruby@3.3/bin:$PATH" bundle exec rails db:test:prepare
